raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"app_usage_preference","confidence":0.92,"matched_text":"I'll try out Evernote for storing my digital coupons.","distilled_fact":"The speaker plans to try out Evernote for storing digital coupons."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"app_usage","confidence":0.89,"matched_text":"I already use it for other notes","distilled_fact":"The speaker already uses Evernote for other notes."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"coupon_habit","confidence":0.84,"matched_text":"I've been getting a lot of coupons in the mail lately","distilled_fact":"The speaker has been getting a lot of coupons in the mail lately."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"preference","confidence":0.81,"matched_text":"especially for my favorite snacks","distilled_fact":"The speaker's favorite snacks are the subject of many of the coupons in the mail."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"coupon_detail","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"I got a great one for $1 off a box of granola bars","distilled_fact":"The speaker got a coupon for $1 off a box of granola bars."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"food_preference","confidence":0.76,"matched_text":"which I always seem to need","distilled_fact":"The speaker always seems to need a box of granola bars."}]}
